description_long: This object is a stylized logo featuring the word 'ÓTICA' in bold black letters, with the 'O' designed to resemble an eye, complete with a central black dot as a pupil. The logo is framed by two sweeping, curved red arcs that mimic the shape of an eye, one above and one below the text. The left side of the logo includes a red, script-like element that appears to be the letters 'CM', blending into the overall eye motif. The design is three-dimensional, with the letters and arcs extruded to give depth and shadow. The surface of the object is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the bold color contrast between the red arcs and black text. There are no visible features or components that resemble a wheelchair, a person, or any mobility aid.
description: A 3D logo with bold black text 'ÓTICA' and red arcs forming an eye shape, featuring a glossy, smooth finish.
description_view_0: The logo is seen from the back, with the text mirrored and the red arcs framing the eye shape clearly visible.
description_view_1: A side profile showing the thin, extruded depth of the logo, with the red arcs and black text forming a narrow silhouette.
description_view_2: The front view displays the 'ÓTICA' text and red arcs in their intended orientation, with the eye motif most prominent.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the extruded depth and layered structure of the logo.
